subcodes.first_line: O bird of the mystic heaven! These earthbound creatures can soar no higher than a thousand cubits, more or less [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائر هوای عرفان این طیور خاک نهایت اوجشان هزار ذراع یا کم و بیش است و لکن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @nearness and remoteness
